messages.content: hello jarv
Hello, Moksh. How can I assist you today?
what are you up to
I'm ready to help you with any questions or tasks you may have, Moksh. I'm waiting for your instructions.
ok let's have a friendly conversation
That sounds great, Moksh. I'd love to have a friendly conversation with you, maybe talk about your interests like eFootball or something else that's been on your mind.
nothing's on my mind right now I am just bus
Sometimes it's nice to just unwind and not think about anything in particular, Moksh. If you're feeling busy, I can just keep you company and chat with you for a bit if you'd like.
yah chat with me
So, Moksh, how's your day been so far, aside from being busy? Has anything interesting or unexpected happened?
unexpected To Kuchh Nahin hua bhai but aaj meri
It sounds like it's been a pretty normal day for you so far, Moksh. You were about to say something about today, but it got cut off - what were you going to say about "aaj meri"?
bhai per to pura Sunta hi nahin hai mujhe bolna hi nahin deta hai
It can be frustrating when someone doesn't let you finish speaking, Moksh. It sounds like you were trying to say something, but got interrupted. Want to try again and tell me what was on your mind?
Main Jab Main bolata Hun To Tu sunna band kar deta hai Jab Aisa Thodi Hota Hai

Moksh, I think there might be some misunderstanding. As a conversational AI, I'm designed to listen and respond to what you say. If it seems like I'm not letting you finish speaking, it's probably because I'm generating responses based on what you've typed so far. Please feel free to finish your thoughts, and I'll do my best to listen and respond thoughtfully.
Achcha Kya Tu mere phone per Jo Bhi Mujhe phone Karega to to uski information

Moksh, as your AI assistant, I don't have the capability to make phone calls or access your phone's contacts. I can provide information and assist with tasks, but I don't have the ability to make or receive phone calls. If you need help with something else, I'm here to assist you.
leave it chal bye
Okay, Moksh, it was nice chatting with you. Bye for now, take care.
